name: Cool Reader
description: Client-side markdown editor with live HTML preview, file open and download, drag-and-drop, and DOMPurify-sanitized rendering. No server required.
featureList: Live markdown to HTML preview with debounced updates
Open and edit .md, .markdown, and .txt in the browser
Drag-and-drop file load onto the editor
HTML sanitized with DOMPurify before DOM insertion
